headline: Intrepid Potash Announces Appointment of Jason Tremblay as Chief Financial Officer
summary: DENVER, June 15, 2026--Intrepid Potash, Inc. ("Intrepid", "the Company", "we", "us", or "our") (NYSE:IPI) today announced the appointment of Jason Tremblay as Chief Financial Officer, effective June 15, 2026.

headline: Why Fertilizer Stocks Didn’t Sell Off on Iran Peace Deal Announcement
summary: CF Industries, Nutrien and Mosaic stocks were down on Monday following the news of a deal that would wind down the Iran war.

headline: Intrepid Potash: Down Significantly, Looking At H2 '26
summary: Intrepid Potash, Inc. stock analysis: downgraded $15 target, Hold rating, and buyback concerns amid volatile earnings and high costs. Click for this IPI update.
